name: HRQ_QUESTIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.QUESTION_ID, B.QSTN_VERSION_NUM, L.QUESTION_TEXT, B.CATEGORY_ID, B.SUBSCRIBER_ID, B.QUESTION_TYPE, B.RESPONSE_TYPE_ID, B.MIN_LENGTH, B.MAX_LENGTH, B.MIN_SELECTIONS, B.MAX_SELECTIONS, B.OWNER, B.PRIVACY_FLAG, B.UPDATE_ALLOWED, B.ADHOC_FLAG, B.RATING_MODEL_ID, B.LATEST_VERSION, B.VERSION_DESCRIPTION, B.ATTACHMENT_ALLOWED, B.STATUS, B.QUESTION_CODE, B.MODULE_ID, B.OVERRIDE_DESC_FLAG, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.SCORED_FLAG, B.MIN_THRESHOLD_SCORE, B.MAX_THRESHOLD_SCORE, B.MAX_POSSIBLE_SCORE, B.CLASSIFICATION_CODE, B.CANDIDATE_CODE, B.ALL_LOCATIONS_FLAG, B.ALL_ORGANIZATIONS_FLAG, B.ALL_JOB_FAMILIES_FLAG, B.ALL_JOB_FUNCTIONS_FLAG, B.CONDITION_QUESTION_ID, B.CONDITION_QSTN_VERSION_NUM, B.CONDITION_ANSWER_ID, B.CONDITION_DISPLAY, B.QSTN_SAMPLE_SIZE, B.QSTN_RESPONSE_ORDER, B.MIN_DATE,B.MAX_DATE, L.INSTRUCTIONS_TEXT, B.ENABLE_COMMENTS, B.SURVEY_TYPE, B.ANALYSIS_GRAPH_TYPE, B.SENTIMENT_ANALYSIS_FLAG, B.SUMMARIZATION_FLAG FROM HRQ_QUESTIONS_B B, HRQ_QUESTIONS_TL L WHERE B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = L.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND B.QUESTION_ID = L.QUESTION_ID AND B.QSTN_VERSION_NUM = L.QSTN_VERSION_NUM AND L.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
